name: Agent Bus Operation Logging
description: New feature identified from task: Add logging to display agent bus write operations in the Task Output panel. When task data is written to the agent bus (e.g., status JSON files like `1741384800000_52998c58f8274975_status.json`), show a message in the Task Output indicating what was written (filename, path, or similar). This helps users track when task state is persisted to the bus.
